category.name: ERROR
category.code: You cannot use quick inquiry/log in with corporate certificate.
Your authorized certificate is not registered for use in other institutions or is discarded. Please register your certificate.
Customers who use hidden accounts cannot use quick inquiry
The authorized certificate you used do not match with the one used for logging in.
The certificate needed to be registered for use in other institutions.
Information on the certificate you use does not exist
The certificate you used do not match with the one used for logging in.
Please close the browser and start transaction again with a new browser.
After the browser is closed, please retry with a new browser
After the browser is closed, please retry with a new browser.
Electronic signature authentication failed. Please log-in with ID and PASSWORD.
Customers who subscribed to Straight2Bank cannot use Internet banking service. Please use Straight2Bank service.
Service is not available in this time. If you want to know detailed available time, press 'confirm' button.
This Service is only available for Web-Portal members.
Corporate member is not allowed to log-in with ID and PASSWORD. Please log-in with certificate)
Sender’s name has already been registered. Please input it again after check.
Receiver’s name has already been registered. Please input it again after check.
There is an active browser that you have been using internet banking with SC bank or incorrect access. Please close every browser windows opened and try again.
Main data is not exists while processing requested transaction, Please contact administrator.
The [IMS_TRAN_CODE] value to be used for [CapHeader] is not 8 digits.
The [BRANCH_NO] value to be used for [CapHeader] is not 3 digits.
We are sorry. An error has occurred during connection with other systems. Please try again after a few minutes.
You are not logged in. Please log in.
You are logged out as the session ended. Please log in again.
You do not have rights to the service.
An error has occurred during connection to other systems.
The error data is included in response.
The [SCFB_MESSAGE_ID] name to be used in sending [GenericServiceTask.executeEgmsService] is not correct.
The [IN_CLASS_CODE] value to be used in [CapHeader] is not 4 digits.
The [stage] value is not configured in WAS Config.
An error has occurred while processing your request. If you wish to carry out deposit/withdrawal transaction, please check the processing result before transaction. Sorry for the inconvenience.
Input data is omitted. Please enter again.
SSO user information is not valid.
You can use this service after logging in.
The [SCFB_MESSAGE_ID] value for sending full text does not exist.
The [BUSINESS_FUNCTION_ID] value for sending full text does not exist.
EAI return full text spec is not defined.
Currently the SCBK allows only one web browser per operation.
The access rights for the page you requested do not match.
Access path IP does not exist.
An error has occurred while processing your request. If you wish to carry out deposit/withdrawal transaction, please check the processing result before transaction. Sorry for the inconvenience.
A browser using SCBK Internet banking already exist, or you have accessed through an incorrect path. Please close all browsers and try again.
The MAC address requested from client and IP address are not valid.
Incorrect security key. Please close every browser windows and try again.
The foreign currency service is not available for non-Korean nationals.
There is an active browser that you have been using internet banking with SC bank or incorrect access. Please close every browser windows opened and try again.

Service only available for customers logged on with digital certificate._Press 'confirm' to log in with digital certificate, press 'cancel' to go to previous page. Customers using device designation service should designate current device in order to Move Money.
Service only available for logged on customers._Press 'confirm' to log in with digital certificate, press 'cancel' to go to previous page.
Can use after subscription to service.
Service suspensed. Please change service status at 'suspense service'
Service cancelled. Please change service status at 'suspense service'
You are not registered as Cozy Bill member.
Dong and Ho of apartment is not registered.
Total number of cases does not match.
It has been already paid or there is an error in the payment amount.
You have already been registered as CozyBill member.
The password is all numbers or less than 6-digit.
There is no ID to change.
Apartment list inquiry failed with an error.
Registration of bill issuer failed with an error.
Bill inquiry/payment failed with an error.
Inquiry of payment certificate failed with an error.
Loading of the task failed with an error.
Execution of task failed with an error. Please check the task execution module.
Output massage change failed with an error.
Type of the item you input does not match.
It was designated as a single case but transferred as a multiple case.
It was designated as a single case but transferred as a multiple case.
The [SERVICE_CODE] value for header data [CommonTrxHead] is not 3 digits.
Please Call SC Bank Customer Service Center Tel 1588-1599
Contact Business Team of Information System Department(check return code)
